recommendations.overview: Aurora's life suddenly gets complicated after her seven grandkids arrive to her house for vacation.

recommendations.overview: Samy moves from the underdeveloped crime-ridden French suburb to the riches of Neuilly.

recommendations.title: SMS

recommendations.title: Mutiny on the Bounty
recommendations.overview: Fletcher Christian successfully leads a revolt against the ruthless Captain Bligh on the HMS Bounty. However, Bligh returns one year later, hell bent on revenge.

recommendations.title: Yeh Jawaani Hai Deewani
recommendations.overview: On a trekking trip, an introverted Naina falls for a charming ex-classmate, whose thirst for adventure drives them apart. Years later, their paths cross again.
